objective: Grow a qualified credit-union audience while preserving editorial trust, usefulness, topic diversity and production quality.

currentDistributionPolicy.frequency: At most one post per weekday and five per week.

decisionThresholds.rule: Do not treat pending metrics, inaccessible analytics or one anomalous post as evidence for a structural change.

guardrails: Never lower sourcing, originality, corrections, SEO, analytics or image quality gates to improve traffic.
Do not optimize solely for impressions, reactions or clicks; include engaged reading, depth, newsletter intent and return behavior.
Preserve editorial diversity and continue covering material developments even when they are not historically high-traffic topics.
Run at most two clearly defined production experiments at once.
Do not change the fixed LinkedIn posting schedule automatically; recommend a schedule change only after the stated sample threshold is met.
Never use personal data, names, email addresses, form values or free-form reader input in analytics or strategy decisions.
